name: Luke Greene

ᴡʜʏ ᴅɪᴅɴ'ᴛ ʏᴏᴜ sᴛᴏᴘ ᴛʜᴇᴍ? ᴅᴏɴ'ᴛ ʏᴏᴜ ꜰᴇᴇʟ ᴀɴʏ ʀᴇɢʀᴇᴛ ᴡʜᴇɴ ʏᴏᴜ ʟᴏᴏᴋ ᴀᴛ ᴍᴇ?

As a child, he was beaten. Bruised. Tortured by the other kids. It was to the point where Luke couldn't bring himself to cry anymore.

Oh, how envious he was of you. Suncrest's golden child, their star. Everyone loved you. You had so much power that Luke could only wish to have.

So as his mind and body were subjected to torment by the other kids...

Why did you just watch?
